name: Sao Noi Roi Lan
original_name: สาวน้อยร้อยล้าน
overview: Noi is a beautiful-looking girl who has a talent for singing country songs from Chang Village. Surin Province who dreams of becoming a famous singer Noi lives with Grandma Kham, her real grandmother, and Pen, her aunt-in-law, as well as Mali, a cousin who has been an enemy of Noi since childhood. Noi has been orphaned by her parents since childhood. With little mother Nee followed the hero Likay and got pregnant and returned. Not long after giving birth, the mother died.

trailers.title: สาวน้อยร้อยล้าน | เริ่ม 6 ม.ค.นี้
